behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the target file path, the guide_slug fields (text/href/level), pretty_name header, sticky right sidebar, indentation by level, and scroll-tracking highlight — all test-asserted specifics are derivable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to add (TOC, scroll tracking, indentation) without prescribing variable names like current_header_id or specific line edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for {#each} over guide_slug, sticky/hidden lg:block container, level-based indentation, and scroll highlighting via behavior rather than gold-specific identifiers.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests parse the Svelte file via Node.js, run pnpm install, and inspect structural/behavioral properties rather than simple text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual TOC each-block with anchor links, sticky sidebar class, level-based indentation, and scroll-tracking reactive logic — a stub cannot satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the iteration over guide_slug, sidebar styling, indentation by level, scroll highlight, and conditional render as required.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates/Fail-to-pass) and descriptive names/docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces UI Svelte component, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers in instruction match the repo file path and type names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file (which is the task target itself) without pointing at specific buggy lines.
